mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_message (to_user_id, title, content, is_read, create_time) VALUES (#{toUserId}, #{title}, #{content}, 0, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_message WHERE to_user_id = #{userId} AND is_read = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_message SET is_read = 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND to_user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE sys_message SET is_read = 1 WHERE to_user_id = #{userId} AND is_read = 0
